key.name: fade-factor
key.description: How much to dim unfocused windows. 0.0 = no dimming, 1.0 = fully black.

key.name: mode
key.description: Which elements to dim. "window" dims only unfocused windows. "fullscreen" dims the entire screen (desktop, panel, and unfocused windows) except the focused window.

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration of the fade animation in milliseconds.
